---
title: "Omics_data_summary"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
#---------------------------------------------------
# inputting all directories and storage locations
#---------------------------------------------------
```{r}
#Directories
#computer <- "mac studio"
computer <- "mac laptop"
if (computer == "mac studio") {
  user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]
  if (user == "sleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/")
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/PANTHER PFAS/"
  }
} else {
  user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]
  if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/")
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  } 
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Summary Tables: Sample Counts by Study, Group, Omics Type
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Load your saved objects
omics_objects <- readRDS(file.path(dir.dat, "Savanah Leidholt", "T1D-T2D", "Data", "omics_split_objects3.rds"))

list2env(omics_objects, envir = .GlobalEnv)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# HELPER: count non-NA samples in a matrix for a given metadata
# ============================================================

count_samples_with_data <- function(meta_df, mat_df) {
  # A sample "has data" if it has at least one non-NA value in the omics matrix
  has_data <- rowSums(!is.na(mat_df)) > 0
  meta_df %>%
    mutate(has_omics = has_data) %>%
    filter(has_omics)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1) PER-OMICS SAMPLE COUNTS: Study x Group
# ============================================================

make_count_table <- function(meta_df, mat_df, omics_label) {
  count_samples_with_data(meta_df, mat_df) %>%
    count(study, group) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    arrange(study) %>%
    mutate(Omics = omics_label, .before = 1)
}

tbl_metabolites <- make_count_table(meta_metab, metabolites,  "Metabolomics")
tbl_lipids      <- make_count_table(meta_lips,  lipids,        "Lipidomics")
tbl_proteins    <- make_count_table(meta_prot,  prot_plasma,   "Proteomics (Plasma)")

cat("\n===== METABOLOMICS: Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_metabolites)

cat("\n===== LIPIDOMICS: Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_lipids)

cat("\n===== PROTEOMICS (Plasma): Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_proteins)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 2) SAMPLES WITH ALL THREE OMICS TYPES: by Group
# ============================================================

# Identify record_ids that have data in all three
ids_metab <- rownames(metabolites)[rowSums(!is.na(metabolites)) > 0]
ids_lipids <- rownames(lipids)[rowSums(!is.na(lipids)) > 0]
ids_prot   <- rownames(prot_plasma)[rowSums(!is.na(prot_plasma)) > 0]

ids_all_three <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids_metab, ids_lipids, ids_prot))

cat("\n===== SAMPLES WITH ALL THREE OMICS TYPES =====\n")
cat("Total samples with metabolomics + lipidomics + proteomics:", length(ids_all_three), "\n\n")

# Pull metadata for these shared samples (use meta_prot as it has all studies)
# Combine metadata sources to get group info for all IDs
str(meta_metab)
str(meta_lips)
str(meta_prot)
meta_metab <- meta_metab %>%
  mutate(across(c(record_id, mrn), as.character))

meta_lips <- meta_lips %>%
  mutate(across(c(record_id, mrn), as.character))

meta_prot <- meta_prot %>%
  mutate(across(c(record_id, mrn), as.character))

meta_combined <- bind_rows(meta_metab, meta_lips, meta_prot) %>%
  distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

all_three_meta <- meta_combined %>%
  filter(record_id %in% ids_all_three)

tbl_all_three <- all_three_meta %>%
  count(group) %>%
  rename(Group = group, `N (all 3 omics)` = n)

print(tbl_all_three)

# Also break out by study x group
tbl_all_three_study <- all_three_meta %>%
  count(study, group) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  arrange(study)

cat("\n--- All Three Omics by Study x Group ---\n")
print(tbl_all_three_study)

```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 3) PROTEOMICS: Ethnicity breakdown by Group
# ============================================================

cat("\n===== PROTEOMICS: Ethnicity by Group =====\n")

tbl_ethnicity <- meta_prot %>%
  filter(rowSums(!is.na(prot_plasma)) > 0) %>%  # only samples with actual proteomic data
  count(group, race_ethnicity_condensed) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = race_ethnicity_condensed,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(group)

print(tbl_ethnicity)

# Also as proportions within each group (useful for demographics table)
cat("\n--- Ethnicity Proportions Within Each Group (%) ---\n")

tbl_ethnicity_pct <- meta_prot %>%
  filter(rowSums(!is.na(prot_plasma)) > 0) %>%
  count(group, race_ethnicity_condensed) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(display = paste0(n, " (", pct, "%)")) %>%
  select(group, race_ethnicity_condensed, display) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = race_ethnicity_condensed,
    values_from = display,
    values_fill = "0 (0%)"
  ) %>%
  arrange(group)

print(tbl_ethnicity_pct)
```

# =============================================================================
# SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS:
# Restrict proteomics workflow to participants with all 3 omics types
# (metabolomics + lipidomics + proteomics)
# This leaves the original analysis untouched
# =============================================================================
```{r}
# --------------------------------------------------
# 1. Identify participants with all three omics types
# --------------------------------------------------

# A sample "has data" if it has at least one non-missing value in that matrix
ids_metab <- rownames(metabolites)[rowSums(!is.na(metabolites)) > 0]
ids_lipids <- rownames(lipids)[rowSums(!is.na(lipids)) > 0]
ids_prot <- rownames(prot_plasma)[rowSums(!is.na(prot_plasma)) > 0]

ids_metab <- trimws(as.character(ids_metab))
ids_lipids <- trimws(as.character(ids_lipids))
ids_prot <- trimws(as.character(ids_prot))

ids_all_three <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids_metab, ids_lipids, ids_prot))

cat("Total participants with all 3 omics:", length(ids_all_three), "\n")

# --------------------------------------------------
# 2. Restrict the proteomics analysis-ready dataset
# --------------------------------------------------

# Start from analysis-ready objects from original workflow
meta_all3 <- meta_common %>%
  mutate(record_id = trimws(as.character(record_id))) %>%
  filter(record_id %in% ids_all_three)

prot_all3 <- prot_plasma_common[meta_all3$record_id, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_all3), meta_all3$record_id))

cat("Original proteomics analysis N:", nrow(meta_common), "\n")
cat("Proteomics analysis N with all 3 omics:", nrow(meta_all3), "\n")
cat("Excluded because not all 3 omics:",
    nrow(meta_common) - nrow(meta_all3), "\n")

cat("Group counts in all-3-omics subset:\n")
print(table(meta_all3$group4, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("Study counts in all-3-omics subset:\n")
print(table(meta_all3$study, useNA = "ifany"))

# --------------------------------------------------
# 3. PCA using all-3-omics subset
# --------------------------------------------------

meta_pca_all3 <- meta_all3
prot_pca_all3 <- prot_all3[meta_pca_all3$record_id, , drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_pca_all3), meta_pca_all3$record_id))

prot_pca_all3 <- as.matrix(prot_pca_all3)

# ---- log2 transform + median impute ----
prot_log_all3 <- log2(prot_pca_all3 + 1)
prot_log_all3[!is.finite(prot_log_all3)] <- NA_real_

prot_imp_all3 <- prot_log_all3
meds_all3 <- apply(prot_imp_all3, 2, function(x) {
  m <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(m)) m else NA_real_
})

for (j in seq_len(ncol(prot_imp_all3))) {
  if (!is.na(meds_all3[j])) prot_imp_all3[is.na(prot_imp_all3[, j]), j] <- meds_all3[j]
}

keep_cols_all3 <- colSums(is.na(prot_imp_all3)) == 0 &
  apply(prot_imp_all3, 2, var) > 0 &
  is.finite(apply(prot_imp_all3, 2, var))

prot_imp_all3 <- prot_imp_all3[, keep_cols_all3, drop = FALSE]

cat("Proteins kept for all-3-omics PCA:", ncol(prot_imp_all3), "\n")

# ---- PCA panels ----
p_all3 <- make_pca_plot(prot_imp_all3, meta_pca_all3, "No adjustment (all 3 omics subset)")

cov_m1_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex, data = meta_pca_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
prot_m1_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(prot_imp_all3), covariates = cov_m1_all3))
p1_all3 <- make_pca_plot(prot_m1_all3, meta_pca_all3, "Age + Sex (all 3 omics subset)")

keep_m2_all3 <- !is.na(meta_pca_all3$bmi)
meta_m2p_all3 <- meta_pca_all3[keep_m2_all3, ]
prot_m2p_all3 <- prot_imp_all3[keep_m2_all3, , drop = FALSE]
cov_m2_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + bmi, data = meta_m2p_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
prot_m2_adj_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(prot_m2p_all3), covariates = cov_m2_all3))
p2_all3 <- make_pca_plot(prot_m2_adj_all3, meta_m2p_all3, "Age + Sex + BMI (all 3 omics subset)")

keep_m3_all3 <- !is.na(meta_pca_all3$bmi) & !is.na(meta_pca_all3$hba1c)
meta_m3p_all3 <- meta_pca_all3[keep_m3_all3, ]
prot_m3p_all3 <- prot_imp_all3[keep_m3_all3, , drop = FALSE]
cov_m3_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + bmi + hba1c, data = meta_m3p_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
prot_m3_adj_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(prot_m3p_all3), covariates = cov_m3_all3))
p3_all3 <- make_pca_plot(prot_m3_adj_all3, meta_m3p_all3, "Age + Sex + BMI + HbA1c (all 3 omics subset)")

keep_m4_all3 <- !is.na(meta_pca_all3$bmi) & !is.na(meta_pca_all3$hba1c) & !is.na(meta_pca_all3$log_uacr)
meta_m4p_all3 <- meta_pca_all3[keep_m4_all3, ]
prot_m4p_all3 <- prot_imp_all3[keep_m4_all3, , drop = FALSE]
cov_m4_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + bmi + hba1c + log_uacr, data = meta_m4p_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
prot_m4_adj_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(prot_m4p_all3), covariates = cov_m4_all3))
p4_all3 <- make_pca_plot(prot_m4_adj_all3, meta_m4p_all3, "Age + Sex + BMI + HbA1c + log(uACR) (all 3 omics subset)")

# Render all-3-omics PCA panel
(p_all3 | p1_all3 | p2_all3) /
  (p3_all3 | p4_all3 | plot_spacer()) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PCA: Proteomics Sensitivity Analysis in Participants with All 3 Omics Types",
    subtitle = "Color = group | Shape = study | Restricted to shared metabolomics + lipidomics + proteomics participants",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

# --------------------------------------------------
# 4. limma using all-3-omics subset
# --------------------------------------------------

Y_all_all3 <- t(log2(as.matrix(prot_all3) + 1))

# -------------------
# Model 1: age + sex
# -------------------
meta_m1_all3 <- meta_all3
Y_m1_all3 <- Y_all_all3[, meta_m1_all3$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m1_all3 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex, data = meta_m1_all3)
colnames(design_m1_all3) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m1_all3))
colnames(design_m1_all3) <- make.names(colnames(design_m1_all3))

contr_m1_all3 <- makeContrasts(
  T1D_vs_LC  = T1D - LC,
  T2D_vs_LC  = T2D - LC,
  T1D_vs_T2D = T1D - T2D,
  OC_vs_LC   = OC - LC,
  T1D_vs_OC  = T1D - OC,
  T2D_vs_OC  = T2D - OC,
  levels = design_m1_all3
)

res_m1_all3 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m1_all3, design_m1_all3, contr_m1_all3)
fit_m1_all3 <- res_m1_all3$fit
out_m1_all3 <- res_m1_all3$out

sig_m1_all3 <- tibble(
  contrast = colnames(contr_m1_all3),
  n_FDR05 = sapply(out_m1_all3, \(tt) sum(tt$adj.P.Val < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
  n_FDR01 = sapply(out_m1_all3, \(tt) sum(tt$adj.P.Val < 0.01, na.rm = TRUE))
) %>% mutate(model = "age_sex_all3", n_samples = nrow(meta_m1_all3))

# -------------------------
# Model 2: age + sex + BMI
# -------------------------
meta_m2_all3 <- meta_all3 %>% filter(!is.na(bmi))
Y_m2_all3 <- Y_all_all3[, meta_m2_all3$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m2_all3 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + bmi, data = meta_m2_all3)
colnames(design_m2_all3) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m2_all3))
colnames(design_m2_all3) <- make.names(colnames(design_m2_all3))

contr_m2_all3 <- makeContrasts(
  T1D_vs_LC  = T1D - LC,
  T2D_vs_LC  = T2D - LC,
  T1D_vs_T2D = T1D - T2D,
  OC_vs_LC   = OC - LC,
  T1D_vs_OC  = T1D - OC,
  T2D_vs_OC  = T2D - OC,
  levels = design_m2_all3
)

res_m2_all3 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m2_all3, design_m2_all3, contr_m2_all3)
fit_m2_all3 <- res_m2_all3$fit
out_m2_all3 <- res_m2_all3$out
sig_m2_all3 <- summarise_sig(out_m2_all3, "age_sex_bmi_all3", nrow(meta_m2_all3))

# ---------------------------------
# Model 3: age + sex + BMI + HbA1c
# ---------------------------------
meta_m3_all3 <- meta_all3 %>% filter(!is.na(bmi), !is.na(hba1c))
Y_m3_all3 <- Y_all_all3[, meta_m3_all3$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m3_all3 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + bmi + hba1c, data = meta_m3_all3)
colnames(design_m3_all3) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m3_all3))
colnames(design_m3_all3) <- make.names(colnames(design_m3_all3))

contr_m3_all3 <- makeContrasts(
  T1D_vs_LC  = T1D - LC,
  T2D_vs_LC  = T2D - LC,
  T1D_vs_T2D = T1D - T2D,
  OC_vs_LC   = OC - LC,
  T1D_vs_OC  = T1D - OC,
  T2D_vs_OC  = T2D - OC,
  levels = design_m3_all3
)

res_m3_all3 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m3_all3, design_m3_all3, contr_m3_all3)
fit_m3_all3 <- res_m3_all3$fit
out_m3_all3 <- res_m3_all3$out
sig_m3_all3 <- summarise_sig(out_m3_all3, "age_sex_bmi_hba1c_all3", nrow(meta_m3_all3))

# ----------------------------------------------
# Model 4: age + sex + BMI + HbA1c + log(uACR)
# ----------------------------------------------
meta_m4_all3 <- meta_all3 %>% filter(!is.na(bmi), !is.na(hba1c), !is.na(log_uacr))
Y_m4_all3 <- Y_all_all3[, meta_m4_all3$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m4_all3 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + bmi + hba1c + log_uacr, data = meta_m4_all3)
colnames(design_m4_all3) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m4_all3))
colnames(design_m4_all3) <- make.names(colnames(design_m4_all3))

contr_m4_all3 <- makeContrasts(
  T1D_vs_LC  = T1D - LC,
  T2D_vs_LC  = T2D - LC,
  T1D_vs_T2D = T1D - T2D,
  OC_vs_LC   = OC - LC,
  T1D_vs_OC  = T1D - OC,
  T2D_vs_OC  = T2D - OC,
  levels = design_m4_all3
)

res_m4_all3 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m4_all3, design_m4_all3, contr_m4_all3)
fit_m4_all3 <- res_m4_all3$fit
out_m4_all3 <- res_m4_all3$out
sig_m4_all3 <- summarise_sig(out_m4_all3, "age_sex_bmi_hba1c_uacr_all3", nrow(meta_m4_all3))

# --------------------------------------------------
# 5. Summarize all-3-omics results
# --------------------------------------------------

summary_all_all3 <- bind_rows(
  sig_m1_all3,
  sig_m2_all3,
  sig_m3_all3,
  sig_m4_all3
) %>%
  select(model, n_samples, contrast, n_FDR05, n_FDR01) %>%
  arrange(contrast, model)

print(summary_all_all3)

summary_wide_all3 <- summary_all_all3 %>%
  select(model, contrast, n_FDR05) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = model, values_from = n_FDR05)

print(summary_wide_all3)

# --------------------------------------------------
# 6. Compare original vs all-3-omics subset
# --------------------------------------------------

summary_compare_all3 <- bind_rows(
  summary_all %>% mutate(dataset = "original"),
  summary_all_all3 %>% mutate(dataset = "all_3_omics_subset")
) %>%
  arrange(contrast, dataset, model)

print(summary_compare_all3)

```
